provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male civilian shuttle pilot in his 40s with a paunch and a relaxed demeanor, wearing a faded tan flight suit with no military patches just a commercial license badge and a fuel company logo, a loose harness that he clearly does not cinch properly, comfortable slip-on deck shoes instead of regulation boots, a personal thermos clipped to his belt, he flies cargo shuttles between stations and treats it like driving a truck
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Alt seed civilian pilot. Consistent relaxed spacer.
